passed: all target_files from plan.json appear in code.json changed_files (Pet.java, PetType.java, PetclinicRestClient.java, PetclinicMcpServer.java, application.properties, petclinic-kubernetes.yaml); test file covered under added_tests

legacy petclinic Deployment container is unmodified
quarkus.http.port=8888 and quarkus.http.cors.enabled=true both present in application.properties
